headline: Hegseth рҹ‘ЁвҖҚвңҲпёҸрҹҳө 'Fog of War' NOPEs Survivors рҹ’ҖрҹҡӨрҹ’Ҙ
text:
Pete Hegseth рҹӣЎпёҸрҹҮәрҹҮё, Trump's WAR DADDY рҹ‘ЁвҖҚвңҲпёҸрҹҚҠ, SWEARING рҹҳӨрҹҷҢ he DIDN'T PERSONALLY SPOT survivors рҹ‘Җрҹҡ« before DROPPING рҹ”Ҙрҹ’Ј on that THICC drug boat рҹҡӨрҹ’Ҡ in Caribbean waters рҹҢҠрҹҚ‘! Initial BOOM рҹ’Ҙ left TWO DUDES clinging рҹ« рҹ”Ҙ to the BURNING WRECK рҹӣҘпёҸрҹ’Ё, but ADMIRAL FRANK BRADLEY рҹҸҙвҖҚвҳ пёҸвҡ“ said 'SINK IT AGAIN рҹҸҠвҖҚвҷӮпёҸрҹ’Җ' вҖ“ SECOND STRIKE GO BRRRRR рҹҳ©рҹ’Ҙ wiping 'em OUT! Hegseth at White House cabinet sesh рҹӨқрҹҸӣпёҸ blames 'FOG OF WAR рҹҢ«пёҸрҹҳӮ' вҖ“ 'Watched LIVE рҹ“ә first hit, then PEACED OUT вңҢпёҸ to meeting, boat EXPLODED рҹӨҜрҹ”Ҙ, couldn't SEE SHIT!' Learned Bradley's 'CORRECT DECISION' вҸ°вң… HOURS later, 'WE GOT HIS BACK рҹӣЎпёҸрҹ’Ә!' Trump рҹҚҠрҹ—ЈпёҸ backs the play TOO, but 'WE DIDN'T KNOW рҹ‘Җрҹҡ«' about follow-up вҖ“ 'WANT THOSE BOATS TAKEN OUT рҹӣҘпёҸрҹ’Җ, DRUGS KILLING AMERIKKKA рҹҮәрҹҮёвҳ пёҸ!' 

WaPo рҹ“°рҹ”Қ spilled the TEA вҳ• first, now Dems рҹҗҙ & GOP рҹҗҳ SIMPS freaking рҹҳұ over GENEVA CONVENTION VIOLATION рҹҡ«рҹҸҘ вҖ“ NO TARGETING WOUNDED BROS рҹ©№рҹ’Җ, gotta CAPTURE & PATCH 'EM UP рҹ§‘вҖҚвҡ•пёҸ! BBC EXPERTS рҹӨ“рҹ“ң calling it STRAIGHT-UP ILLEGAL рҹҡЁвҡ–пёҸ under int'l law. Senate Armed Services рҹ‘Ҙрҹ”Қ vowing 'VIGOROUS OVERSIGHT' рҹ•өпёҸвҖҚвҷӮпёҸрҹ’Ҙ to DIG DEETS! Bradley, ex-JSOC BOSS рҹҸҙвҖҚвҳ пёҸвһЎпёҸ now SOCOM KING рҹ‘‘вҡ”пёҸ (PROMOTED рҹ“Ҳ a MONTH after BOOM), hitting Capitol Hill THIS WEEK рҹ—“пёҸрҹҺӨ to SPILL! 

Trump admin SLAYING рҹ”Әрҹ’Ҡ with 80+ DEAD рҹ’Җрҹ“Ҳ in Caribbean/E-Pacific STRIKE WAVE рҹҢҠрҹ’Ҙ since early Sept вҖ“ 'SELF-DEFENSE BAYBEE рҹӣЎпёҸрҹҮәрҹҮё saving LIVES from FENTANYL FLOOD рҹ’ҠрҹҢҠ!' Don claims MASSIVE DRUG TRAFFICK DROP рҹ“үрҹҡ« (NO PROOF THO рҹ‘ҖрҹҳӮ), vows LAND STRIKES NEXT рҹҸқпёҸрҹ’Ј 'START DOING IT ON SHORE!' US MIL pumping IRON рҹ’Ә in region, EXPANDING PRESENCE рҹ—әпёҸрҹ”Ҙ. Hegseth & Bradley THIRSTING HARD рҹӨӨвҡ“ over narco boats, but LAWMAKERS Cucking out рҹҳ©рҹҡ« вҖ“ FOGGY WAR or WAR CRIME ORGY рҹ’Җвҡ–пёҸ? Wall Street bets on MORE BOOMS рҹ“Ҳрҹ’Ҙ, Trump like 'SEND IT!' рҹҚҠрҹҡҖ!
